_description: Inference-time audio preprocessing for the mel_cnn binary apnea detector. These values must match what the model was trained on; changing any of them invalidates the checkpoint.

db_normalization._description: Power spectrogram is converted to dB with a fixed reference (1e-10 power floor), clamped to [db_floor, db_ceil], then linearly mapped to [0, 1]. This preserves cross-segment loudness, which is discriminative for apnea.

input_tensor_shape._description: Shape that goes into the model: (batch, channels=1, n_mels=128, time_frames=313). 313 = ceil(160000 / 512) + 1 from torchaudio MelSpectrogram.
